title: Portable Bedrolls
description: imalittlhigh's Portable Bedrolls updated for the latest version. [1.21.5]
body:
# ![Portable Bedrolls Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff731c5b8c5a748c680a50510afc35d72fba3bb2.png)
This data pack adds bedrolls that allow players to sleep anywhere in the overworld **without setting their spawn point.** Ideal for nomads, adventurers, and _AFK_ farmers, they offer a way to pass the night without risking accidental respawn changes.

**Bedrolls come in a variety of colors. To craft, line one wool of any color and two feathers in a row.** 
Right-click the bedroll while laying down to get up.

**Bedrolls don't reset phantom spawn timers.** Why? Maybe it's because bedrolls are more like a short nap than a deep rest. In all seriousness though, phantom spawns are dependent on a custom statistic that is reset by sleeping in a bed. Custom statistics aren't modifiable via commands.

## Compatibility
Patchless support for:
- [Sleeping Messages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sleeping-messages)
- [AFK Sleep](https://modrinth.com/datapack/afk-sleep)

## Support
I do not have plans to backport Portable Bedrolls. If you have issues with the data pack, contact me through Discord (`1cale`) or create a new issue on GitHub.

## Credit
The original author is [imalittlhigh](https://modrinth.com/user/imalittlhigh). They made Portable Bedrolls what it is. I just updated it and extended it.
